m_Item1.QuestionText: In which case adjacency list is preferred infront of an adjacency matrix?
m_Item1.Explanation: A Sparse Graph is graph  in which the number of edges  is much less than the possible number of edges. so to represent such graoh adjacency matrix is suitable way.

m_Item1.QuestionText: Depth First Search is equivalent to which of the traversal in the Binary Trees?
In binary search tree if you delete a node having both left and right children then its parent is connected with_______
m_Item1.Explanation:
(a) Inorder (Left, Root, Right) : 4 2 5 1 3
(b) Preorder (Root, Left, Right) : 1 2 4 5 3
(c) Postorder (Left, Right, Root) : 4 5 2 3 1
If We delete 2 which has left and right child then 5 is connected to 1 which is inorder successor  of 2 .
